summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TripSync Group Polling feature. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI loads properly with 2 active polls, voting functionality works, notifications are sent to participants, and both admin and Sophie can access the feature successfully.

minor_issues.impact: Live updates not working, but core functionality unaffected

minor_issues.issue: Notification bell component lacks data-testid attribute for easier testing

passed_tests: POST /api/trips/{id}/polls/{poll_id}/close closes polls and finds winner
Notifications created for poll creation and closure
Trip workspace displays Group Polls card with purple gradient
Group Polls page loads with 2 active polls
Poll cards show vote counts, percentages, and participant avatars
Admin's vote shown with checkmark and 'You voted!' confirmation
New Poll button opens creation form
Quick start templates populate question and options
Close button available for poll creator
